source: Oxygen Cold Email Playbook (adapted for Nebula audit-first model)
note: All frameworks rewritten to use the free audit as the hook, not 'book a meeting'.

frameworks.name: Audit + same-industry case study
frameworks.template: {{first_name}}, ran a conversion audit for {{company}} using the same {{mechanism}} we used to help {{client_in_same_industry}} increase conversions by {{result}}. Your audit is ready: {{audit_url}}
frameworks.nebula_adaptation: {{first_name}}, ran a landing page audit for {{company}} — same process we used to help a {{client_in_same_industry}} go from 0.8% to 2.4% conversion rate. Your results: {{audit_url}}
frameworks.when_to_use: After identifying a buying trigger (ad spend + no conversions)

frameworks.name: Free audit-as-gift
frameworks.template: {{first_name}}, interested in a free conversion audit for {{company}}? P.S. {{social_proof}}
frameworks.nebula_adaptation: {{first_name}}, ran a free landing page audit for {{company}}. Takes 30 seconds, shows you exactly what's costing conversions. {{audit_url}} P.S. Same tool found {{common_leak}} in 60% of SaaS pages we scanned last month.
frameworks.when_to_use: Warm leads (engagers, followers, reply to previous outreach)

frameworks.name: Risk-reversed audit
frameworks.template: {{first_name}}, interested in {{dream_result}} with {{mechanism}} for {{company}} in the next {{timeframe}}? Our {{mechanism}} guarantees {{dream_result}} in {{timeframe}} or {{risk_reversal}}.
frameworks.nebula_adaptation: {{first_name}}, interested in doubling your landing page conversion rate in the next 30 days — without spending more on traffic? Run the free audit first. If it doesn't show you at least 3 conversion leaks you didn't know about, you're out nothing. {{audit_url}}
frameworks.when_to_use: Objection-prone prospects (founders who've been burned by agencies)

frameworks.name: Pain question → audit
frameworks.nebula_adaptation: {{first_name}}, running ads with conversion under 2%? The audit diagnoses exactly which leak is costing you — headline, CTA, trust, speed, or mobile. 30 seconds, no sales call. {{audit_url}} P.S. Pages that fix their headline see 2-3x improvement within 7 days.
frameworks.when_to_use: Triggered leads — people who've posted/complained about ad spend with no conversions

frameworks.name: Signal + quick fix
frameworks.nebula_adaptation: {{first_name}}, saw your post about {{their_recent_post_or_comment}}. Noticed you mentioned ad spend with no conversions. The landing page is usually the bottleneck — not the ads. Run a free audit: 30 seconds, shows you exactly what to fix. {{audit_url}}
frameworks.when_to_use: Reddit/LinkedIn trigger monitor finds a post — reply value-first, then follow up with this email

frameworks.name: Market insight + audit invite
frameworks.nebula_adaptation: {{first_name}}, you're in {{industry}}, right? We audited 100 landing pages in that space last month. Only 6 had a clear CTA above the fold. That's a $0 fix that doubles conversion rate. Curious where yours lands: {{audit_url}}
frameworks.when_to_use: Industry-specific outreach — show you understand their vertical

frameworks.name: Give this post somewhere to go (GTM framework)
frameworks.original: LinkedIn GTM CTA — audit link, not 'what do you think'
frameworks.nebula_adaptation: {{first_name}}, saw your post on {{topic}}. Most people stop at engagement metrics — but the real signal is who replies. I built a free landing page audit that diagnoses exactly what's costing conversions. Curious if it finds the same leak on your page: {{audit_url}}
frameworks.cta: value-first audit link in reply to their post engagement
frameworks.when_to_use: After engaging with their LinkedIn post — value first, link second

icp_memo_subject_lines.note: From ICP_MEMO forensic research. Use verbatim bleeding-neck language — do not polish.

money_hook.formula: Your landing page is leaking ~$[X]/month. Here's the audit.
variants: Your page is leaking ~${{monthly_leak}} in ad spend. Free audit: {{audit_url}}
Saw your ad. Your landing page has 3 leaks costing you ~${{monthly_leak}}.
money_hook.when: Use when you know their approximate ad spend from the trigger signal

time_hook.formula: Paid traffic audit done in under 60 minutes, delivered before your next ad set goes live.
variants: Landing page audit in 30 seconds. See exactly what's costing conversions.
60-minute fix for the conversion leak killing your {{vertical}} ads.
Your next ad set goes live when? Audit done before you press launch.
time_hook.when: Use when speed is the objection — founder just posted about another failed campaign

exclusivity_hook.formula: I audited 40+ pages this month and found 1 pattern killing 90% of them. Yours matches it.
variants: We audited 40 {{vertical}} pages this month. 36 had the same leak above the fold.
One pattern killed 9 of the last 10 ad campaigns I audited. Your page has it.
Scanned your page. Same above-fold gap that killed ${{common_lost_amount}} for {{similar_company}}.
exclusivity_hook.when: Use for warm leads or re-engagement — implies you already looked at their page

silent_objection_pre_empt.note: Address 'I've been burned before' before they think it. Use on Day 3 follow-up.
silent_objection_pre_empt.template: {{first_name}}, I get it — last agency charged for a 'testing phase' and delivered nothing. This isn't that. 30 seconds, no call, no contract. Just your page score and what to fix. {{audit_url}}

implementation_notes: Never use these as-is. Rewrite in your own voice.
Remove {{placeholder}} tokens — fill with real data before sending.
Audit URL should be a unique tracking link per lead (pass email as query param for auto-fill).
Follow-up sequence: Day 0 audit email → Day 3 'did you run it?' → Day 7 'here's a similar page's results' → Day 14 last touch. No more than 4 touches per cycle.
Recircle cadence: same ICP every 30-60 days with new audit findings / new content.
